### DomainEventTargetProvider()

`DomainEventTargetProvider` will create a `DomainEventTarget` instance and provide it using react context provider.

```typescript
DomainEventTargetProvider: ({ children }: React.PropsWithChildren<{}>) => React.JSX.Element
```

#### DomainEventTargetProvider的参数
